en_title: '60fps Feels Like a Bridge Too far' — Tech Experts Cast Doubt on Those GTA 6 Quality and Performance Mode 'Leaks'
subtitle: 60帧？别想了
opus_summary: 分析指出《GTA6》在当前主机难跑60帧，PS5 Pro顶多40帧。Rockstar向来重画质轻帧率，玩家勿信零售传闻。游戏11月19日发售。

paragraphs.en: You might have seen reports doing the rounds that GTA 6 will come with a mode that lets you play it at 60 frames per second, based on retailer listings that have emerged online. Well, like so many things around Rockstar’s upcoming gaming behemoth, do not believe everything you read.
paragraphs.cn: 你可能已经看到网上流传的报道，称根据网上出现的零售商列表，《GTA6》将自带一个可以以每秒60帧运行的模式。然而，就像围绕Rockstar这款即将推出的游戏巨作的许多事情一样，不要轻信你读到的一切。

paragraphs.en: The tech experts at Digital Foundry have said there’s nothing they’ve seen of GTA 6 so far — including the recently released screenshots and brief video clips — that suggests a 60fps mode is possible on the current generation of consoles, although of course Rockstar has yet to make anything official.
paragraphs.cn: Digital Foundry的技术专家表示，目前为止他们看到的《GTA6》所有内容——包括最近发布的截图和短视频片段——都不表明在现世代主机上实现60帧模式是可能的，当然，Rockstar尚未公布任何官方信息。

paragraphs.en: “Unfortunately, the level of detail evident in the trailer, preorder screenshots and other, more recent footage seems extremely challenging to scale down in a way that allows for a 60fps mode,” DF’s Will Judd said.
paragraphs.cn: DF的Will Judd说：「遗憾的是，预告片、预购截图及其他近期画面中显而易见的细节水平，要想缩减到能实现60帧模式的程度似乎极其困难。」

paragraphs.en: That assessment is based on the established demands that games heavy on simulation have on the CPUs of the nearly six-year-old consoles (“the GTA 6 world looks another level of magnitude more challenging than the likes of Dragon's Dogma 2 or Baldur's Gate 3”). With GTA 6 this is an even tougher challenge because of the speed you can move around the open world. DF predicts 30fps for GTA 6 across the consoles, saying “60fps feels like a bridge too far.”
paragraphs.cn: 这一评估基于仿真度高的游戏对服役近六年的主机CPU的公认要求（「《GTA6》的世界看起来比《龙之信条2》或《博德之门3》之类的游戏高一个数量级的挑战」）。对于《GTA6》来说，挑战更加艰巨，因为你在开放世界中移动的速度很快。DF预测《GTA6》在主机上均为30帧，并表示「60帧感觉要求太高了」。

paragraphs.en: Even the more powerful PS5 Pro would struggle to output GTA 6 at 60fps, DF suggests, because it only offers “a fractional CPU performance bump” over base PS5 (the Pro is more more about improved Ray Tracing and support for PSSR upscaling than it is higher framerate). At best, DF suggests a 40fps mode could be possible on PS5 Pro, but again, that’s unconfirmed for now.
paragraphs.cn: DF认为，即便是性能更强的PS5 Pro也难以让《GTA6》以60帧输出，因为它相对于基础版PS5仅提供了「微小的CPU性能提升」（Pro更侧重于改进光线追踪和对PSSR升级技术的支持，而非更高的帧率）。DF指出，最好情况下PS5 Pro可能实现40帧模式，但同样，目前这并未得到确认。

paragraphs.en: And it's worth noting Rockstar’s own release history suggests 60fps isn’t happening for GTA 6. GTA 4, GTA 5 and Red Dead Redemption 2 all launched at 60fps on console, with the focus on fidelity at 30fps. The developer just doesn't tend to release games built around delivering 60fps.
paragraphs.cn: 值得注意的是，Rockstar自身的发行历史也表明《GTA6》不太可能有60帧。《GTA4》、《GTA5》和《荒野大镖客：救赎2》在主机上均以60帧发布，但重点还是在30帧下的画质表现。这家开发商通常不会发布以60帧为核心打造的游戏。

paragraphs.en: A supposed quality and performance mode isn't the only questionable gta 6 rumor doing the rounds. Over the weekend, we reported on , all of which turned out to be untrue. Why has Rockstar decided not to go with a disc version of GTA 6, risking angering core gamers in the process? There are a number of reasons, analysts told IGN this week, and they all make commercial sense . Meanwhile, some retailers are refusing to sell GTA 6 because the physical version lacks a disc .
paragraphs.cn: 所谓画质与性能模式并非目前流传的唯一可疑《GTA6》传闻。上周末，我们报道了数则消息，但后来都被证实为虚假。Rockstar为何决定不推出《GTA6》光盘版，甘愿冒惹怒核心玩家的风险？分析师本周向IGN透露，背后原因有很多，且都符合商业逻辑。与此同时，一些零售商正因为实体版不含光盘而拒绝销售《GTA6》。

paragraphs.en: Last week, IGN reported on the results of our own poll where we asked if you’re going to buy the $100 Ultimate Edition or the $80 Standard Edition. Somewhat surprisingly, over 70% of you intend to buy the more expensive version.
paragraphs.cn: 上周，IGN报道了我们自己的一项调查结果，询问玩家是打算购买100美元(约合人民币680元)的终极版，还是80美元(约合人民币544元)的标准版。结果有点出乎意料：超过70%的人打算购买更昂贵的版本。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 releases on PS5 and Xbox Series X and S on November 19, 2026.
Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
